DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT KEVIN SEMIENS MOTION TO COMPEL IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT RESPONSES TO DEFENDANT'S REQUEST FOR ADMISSIONS, FORM INTERROGATORIES, SET TWO, SUPPLEMENTAL INTERROGATORIES, AND SUPPLEMENTAL REQUEST FOR PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS SHALL BE SERVED ON OR BEFORE OCTOBER 16, 2016. ALL OTHER REQUESTS FOR RELIEF ARE DENIED. THE PLAINTIFF WAS IN PRO PER THROUGH AUGUST 12, 2016. ON THAT DATE RETAINED COUNSEL APPEARED IN THE ACTION. BASED ON THE RECENT RETENTION OF COUNSEL JUDGE PRO TEM BRUCE HIGHMAN BY ORDER ON JULY 25, 2016 AND INFORMAL ORDER THEREAFTER ALLOWED THE PLAINTIFF SIMILAR RELIEF, TO WIT AN EXTENSION OF TIME TO OCTOBER 16, 2016 RESPOND TO OUTSTANDING DISCOVERY. ORDER SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: STEVEN STEIN; CLERK: FELICIA GREEN; NOT REPORTED; DEPT. 302.

Off Calendar Mar-20-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEVIN SEMIEN Motion To Re-File First Amended Cross-Complaint is granted. No opposition filed. Order signed. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Felicia Green; Court Reporter: Carol Karen, CSR No. 8189, email: ckaren@sftc.org; Dept. 302.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-04-2016 Continued To May-24-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Notice Of Defendant Kevin Semiens Motion To Compel
Off Calendar Aug-23-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances in the matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT KEVIN SEMIEN's Motion To Compel is granted to the extent responses to Defendant's Request for Admissions, Form Interrogatories, Set Two, Supplemental Interrogatories, and Supplemental Request for Production of Documents shall be served on or before October 16, 2016. All other requests for relief are denied. The plaintiff was in pro per through August 12, 2016. On that date retained counsel appeared in the action. Based on the recent retention of counsel Judge Pro Tem Bruce Highman by Order on July 25, 2016 and informal order thereafter allowed the plaintiff similar relief, to wit an extension of time to October 16, 2016 respond to outstanding discovery. Order signed. Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Defendant Kevin Semiens Motion
Off Calendar Jul-18-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Lazaro Soler Alvarez, in pro per, for plaintiffs;
Sean Moriarty, of Cesari Werner & Moriarty, Tel. 650.991.5126, for defendants;
Spanish Court Interpreter: Dave Navarro.

Ruling: The matter was not argued. DEFENDANT KEVIN SEMIEN's Motion is granted. Request for monetary sanctions are denied. The Court shall retain jurisdiction. Judge Pro Tem: Bruce Highman; Clerk: Felicia Green; Not reported; Dept. 302.

Notice Of Defendant Kevin Semiens Motion

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES - LAZARO SOLER, TEL. NO. 1-415-756-4647, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER;
ATTY. SEAN P. MORIARTY OF THE LAW OFFICES OF CESARI, WERNER AND MORIARTY, TEL. NO. 1-650-991-5126 EXT. 15 APPEARING FOR THE DEFENDANT.

MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
Off Calendar Apr-07-2016 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John Cowan of Law Offices of John E. Cowan telephone number 415-982-6800 for Plaintiff.
Patrick Goggin of Law Offices of Patrick D. Goggin telephone number 415-981-9290 for Plaintiff.
Plaintiff Lazaro Soler Alvarez also present in Court.
Margo Seely Court Certified Spanish Interpreter #301386.

The only people present in Court were Court Staff, Counsel, Mr. Alvarez and the Interpreter. Counsel explained circumstances. The Court advised Mr. Alvarez to seek new Counsel. The Court granted Attorney Patrick Goggin's MOTION TO BE RELEIVED AS COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF LAZARO ALVAREZ effective as of today. Order signed in open Court. Discovery responses are now due by May 7, 2016.

Judge: Harold Kahn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR #5976. (302/HK)
